product_results.title: Vooii Compatible with iPhone 16 Pro Max Case, Liquid Silicone Upgrade [Camera Protection] [Soft Anti-Scratch Microfiber Lining] Shockproof Phone Case for iPhone 16 Pro Max 6.9 inch - Chalk Pink

authors_reviews.title: Camera button cut out not sturdy
authors_reviews.text: Very soft but disappointed with the notch on the camera button. It’s not sturdy at all and will flip and move if you touch the edge of the case near the camera button.
authors_reviews.author: Christopher L
